title: Cat Creeper
description: Makes the creeper cute and catsy ^_^
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0fcee71fb60cc6904a51b671b1bae1f92ef9883c.png) # Creepers but cute These cute creatures would never do anything, yes? Look out for those cute eared, smiling creatures because they have a great explosiv power. ## ! Needed ! Texture Pack need [ETF] Entity Texture Features and [EMF] Entity Model Features. [](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) ## Other Texture packs by me [![Vanilla_Imagined](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/79a49fabe5249c21521165f3f0e22de814246919.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/vanilla-imagined) ## Here are some screenshots of Texture Pack ^_^ In the wild, ![1](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/thatguymiki/Cat-Creepers/refs/heads/main/2025-05-16_17.29.56.png) Underground, ![2](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/thatguymiki/Cat-Creepers/refs/heads/main/2025-05-16_17.28.17.png) And at night. ![3](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/thatguymiki/Cat-Creepers/refs/heads/main/2025-05-16_17.27.22.png)
Texturepack by ThatGuyMiki ARR.
